summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tilt AI decision layer app iteration 3 with Document Picture-in-Picture floating palette implementation. Backend APIs working correctly, frontend components properly structured with all required data-testids, and PiP integration code is correctly implemented.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Budget exceeded error for empty input test case
flaky_endpoints.workaround: LLM API budget limit reached - not a code issue

passed_tests: Backend /api/health endpoint returns 200 OK
Backend /api/generate-decisions works with normal input
Backend /api/generate-decisions works with preferences and tone traits
Backend /api/generate-decisions works with minimal input
Decision response structure validation (safe/smart/bold with reasoning)
Landing page loads with correct headline 'Decide better. Not faster.'
Updated hint 'a floating palette opens on top of any window' is present
Share your screen button present and clickable
App root has correct styling (bg-[#050505])
Document PiP API support detected in browser
All required data-testids present in built code
FloatingPalette component with pip-decision-input, pip-submit-btn, pip-card-safe/smart/bold, pip-copy-btn, pip-new-decision-btn
ScreenShareView component with screen-share-view, open-palette-btn, context-label, bottom-palette-trigger
CommandPalette fallback component with command-palette-overlay, decision-input, submit-decision-btn
App.js properly imports and uses pipHelper for Document PiP
Keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+K) work correctly
No console errors detected
Responsive design working on mobile and desktop
Frontend compiles without errors
Build process successful with all components included

success_percentage.backend: 80% (4/5 tests passed - 1 failed due to budget limit)
